---
title: "ISSS608-VAA"
---

## Hello, my name is ***Serene Cheng***.

![](images/ChatGPT%20Image%20Apr%2022,%202026,%2004_37_30%20PM.png){fig-align="left" width="500"}

Welcome to **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications**. In this website, you will find my coursework prepared for this course. Credits to **Professor Kam Tin Seong** for his valuable lessons and the course materials!

If you're interested, you can navigate to the top right 'About' tab to find out more about me.
